prompt: I want to create a Japanese cover image for a strategy board game. The game is called 'Splendor' and it's about Renaissance gem trading. I need a visually appealing image with Japanese text overlay. What's the exact command and what should my prompt look like?

assertions.name: exact-task-command
assertions.description: Provides the exact syntax: task image:gen:ai PROMPT='...' OUTPUT='...'

assertions.name: japanese-prompt-provided
assertions.description: Includes a concrete Japanese language prompt (not English)

assertions.name: game-theme-relevant
assertions.description: Prompt references Renaissance, gems, trading, or strategy (Splendor's core themes)

assertions.name: text-overlay-mentioned
assertions.description: Prompt or instructions explicitly mention Japanese text overlay capability
